title: Thaipalum Thanneerum Song Lyrics Chandi Veeran
stanzas:
thaipalum thanneerum
onnaathaan irundhuchu
velai illaama kedanthuchu
aanaa ippo ellaame
thalakeezha ponuchu
thadam maari ninnuchu

aariukkum pakkathula
ooru uruvaaguchu
varalaaru solluchu.
ooru mattum
irukkuthaiyaa
aara mattum kaanala.
pona idam theriyala.

nilavula thanneeru
irukkaanu thedurom
rocketa yevurom
kudineera boomiyila
vyabaaram pannurom
tamilStanzas:
தாய்ப்பாலும் தண்ணீரும்
ஒன்னாதான் இருந்துச்சு
விலை இல்லாம கெடந்துச்சு
ஆனா இப்போ எல்லாமே
தலைகீழா போனுச்சு
தடம் மாறி நின்னுச்சு

ஆறிருக்கும் பக்கத்துல
ஊரு உருவாகுச்சு
வரலாறு சொல்லுச்சு
ஊரு மட்டும் இருக்குதய்யா
ஆற மட்டும் காணல.
போன இடம் தெரியல.

நிலவுல தண்ணீரு
இருக்கானு தேடுறோம்.
ராக்கெட்டை ஏவுறோம்
குடிநீரை பூமியில
வியாபாரம் பண்ணுறோம்.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song reflects on nostalgia and the changes in life, emphasizing the importance of remembering one's roots.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie?

In Chandi Veeran, the song underscores the protagonist's journey and his connection to his hometown.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The singer and music director for Thaipalum Thanneerum are currently unknown.

When was the song released?

Thaipalum Thanneerum was released on August 2, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thaipalum Thanneerum, the lyrics delve into themes of nostalgia and the passage of time, reflecting the protagonist's longing for his roots. The song evokes a sense of melancholy, inviting listeners to reminisce about their own past experiences. Its folk melody adds a unique charm, making it a memorable piece within the context of Chandi Veeran. Overall, the song beautifully captures the essence of home and the emotional ties that bind us.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thaipalum Thanneerum from the movie Chandi Veeran captures a deep sense of nostalgia and reflection. The song's poignant lyrics resonate with listeners, evoking memories of simpler times. Its unique folk melody makes it a standout piece that beautifully complements the film's themes.
stanzaMeanings: Water and soil have always been together, without any work they have mixed, but now everything has changed and gone down.
In the nearby area, the village has formed and is talking about the past. Is it only the village that remains, or is there something else to see? I don't know where the place has gone.
We search for water in the moonlight, we are ready to rock. We are doing business on this earth.
